name: code-quality-atlas
description: A research-derived suite of 24 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.
